title: Fallout Vault Structure Pack
description: A Vault you can discover out in the savanna's, it has loot and 4 crafting stations to help you craft 3 special armors.
body: this is a Fallout Vault pack where you can find these anywhere in the Savanna's, upon entering the Vault, you can find some loot, Assaultron you may have to fight off AND 4 different crafting stations to guide you into making 2 different Power Armors and 1 Advanced Riot set and of course a Terminal where you can buy Nuka Caps for smaller items such as an MRE package, salt, a Fusion Core and a Nuka Cola for those long days. Anyways, I hope you enjoy
